description_long: This is a stylized yacht with a single large, triangular white sail mounted on a central brown mast. The hull is rectangular with a flat bottom and is primarily brown with a yellow trim along the top edge, featuring a series of square white portholes along the sides. The bow is slightly pointed and includes a small yellow bowsprit, while the stern is squared off and features a yellow accent. The deck is open and recessed, with no visible cabin or superstructure, and the interior appears hollow. The yacht sits on a flat, transparent base, suggesting it is a display or model. The overall design is blocky and geometric, reminiscent of voxel art.
description: A blocky, brown and yellow yacht with a large white sail and open deck, featuring square portholes and a flat bottom hull.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hull, the large white sail, yellow trim, and square portholes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, central mast, and yellow bowsprit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the hull's length, sail, and portholes.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the squared stern, open deck interior, and the mast's attachment point.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a flat bottom, rectangular cross-section, slightly pointed bow, squared stern, brown hull with yellow trim, and a row of square white portholes along each side.
attribute_deck_layout: Single open recessed deck with no visible levels, cabins, or superstructure; deck is bordered by yellow trim and is accessible from above, with a central mast and no visible railings or equipment.
attribute_cabin_structure: No visible cabin structure; the deck is open and hollow with no windows, doors, or enclosed areas.
